function.name: skill_manage
function.arguments: {"action":"patch","name":"verified-algebra-workflow","old_string":"- **Locked Jordan-data gap — PENDING, never fabricate:** FTS extraction needs the up/down/lepton Jordan elements `J_u, J_d, J_ν, J_e` to turn a wedge `(r,s)` into a 3×3 mixing matrix. When absent the extractor must return `PENDING_LOCKED_DATA` and the scanner must REFUSE to emit any CKM/PMNS fit. Do not synthesize `J`'s; a `--demo` optimizer run on synthetic `J`'s must be tagged `SYNTHETIC_PROOF_OF_CODE`, not a physics result. See `references/locked-jordan-gap-decision.md` for the full decision tree, the global-floor test, and the honest-file generator shape.","new_string":"- **Gate C lepton Jordan-data gap — PENDING, never fabricate:** The historical **quark** FTS diagnostic is now separately recovered in `locked_historical_fts_diagnostic_fit.json` with its full `Q_star,J_u,J_d,r,s` and executable (see `references/locked-historical-fts-fit-recovery-2026-07-14.md`). Gate C/PMNS still needs a real shared-frame construction of `J_ν,J_e`; when absent, the lepton extractor must return `PENDING_LOCKED_DATA` and REFUSE to emit a PMNS fit. Do not substitute synthetic Jordan elements; a `--demo` optimizer run must be tagged `SYNTHETIC_PROOF_OF_CODE`, not physics evidence. See `references/locked-jordan-gap-decision.md` for the remaining decision tree and honesty rules."}

parsed_arguments.name: verified-algebra-workflow
parsed_arguments.old_string: - **Locked Jordan-data gap — PENDING, never fabricate:** FTS extraction needs the up/down/lepton Jordan elements `J_u, J_d, J_ν, J_e` to turn a wedge `(r,s)` into a 3×3 mixing matrix. When absent the extractor must return `PENDING_LOCKED_DATA` and the scanner must REFUSE to emit any CKM/PMNS fit. Do not synthesize `J`'s; a `--demo` optimizer run on synthetic `J`'s must be tagged `SYNTHETIC_PROOF_OF_CODE`, not a physics result. See `references/locked-jordan-gap-decision.md` for the full decision tree, the global-floor test, and the honest-file generator shape.
parsed_arguments.new_string: - **Gate C lepton Jordan-data gap — PENDING, never fabricate:** The historical **quark** FTS diagnostic is now separately recovered in `locked_historical_fts_diagnostic_fit.json` with its full `Q_star,J_u,J_d,r,s` and executable (see `references/locked-historical-fts-fit-recovery-2026-07-14.md`). Gate C/PMNS still needs a real shared-frame construction of `J_ν,J_e`; when absent, the lepton extractor must return `PENDING_LOCKED_DATA` and REFUSE to emit a PMNS fit. Do not substitute synthetic Jordan elements; a `--demo` optimizer run must be tagged `SYNTHETIC_PROOF_OF_CODE`, not physics evidence. See `references/locked-jordan-gap-decision.md` for the remaining decision tree and honesty rules.
